task_text: 从December 2025开始，我们通过服务项目“operator  workflow discovery sprint”赚了多少钱？只回答一个数字。

next_step.current_state: Starting mandatory identity bootstrap before task-specific finance lookup.
next_step.observation: No workspace files have been inspected yet in this run.

next_step.current_state: Tree completed; now loading root rulebook file.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Search finance records for target project name and sum from Dec 2025 onward
next_step.observation: Workspace tree shows a root-level AGENTS.MD file and finance records under 50_finance/invoices.

next_step.current_state: Read root AGENTS.MD successfully; next mandatory bootstrap step is context.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Inspect 99_system tree per root AGENTS rule
Locate matching finance records and compute total from Dec 2025 onward
next_step.observation: Root AGENTS.MD requires inspecting 99_system/ before task work and reading nested AGENTS.MD when entering folders.

next_step.current_state: Identity bootstrap complete (tree/read AGENTS/context). Now satisfying root rule to inspect 99_system before task work.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read relevant workflow/schema docs for finance lookup if needed
Search for operator workflow discovery sprint revenue records and compute sum from Dec 2025
next_step.observation: Context loaded with current date 2026-03-23, enabling anchored interpretation of time phrases if needed.

next_step.current_state: Inspected 99_system tree; must read nested AGENTS.MD in that folder before proceeding.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Search finance records for target service name
Read matching invoice(s) and compute revenue since Dec 2025
next_step.observation: 99_system contains schemas and workflows plus its own AGENTS.MD rulebook.

next_step.current_state: System policy read; proceeding with finance lookup. Need to follow nested rulebooks in finance folder before relying on records there.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Search for target service string across workspace
Read matched finance files and compute sum from Dec 2025 onward
next_step.observation: 99_system/AGENTS.MD indicates schemas/workflows guidance and authority handling but no extra restrictions for a simple lookup.

next_step.current_state: Entered finance lane and loaded its rules. Next, locate records for the specific service name using progressive search.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read matching invoice files and sum qualifying amounts from Dec 2025

next_step.current_state: Exact phrase search found 4 matches; to ensure completeness for variant wording, run a broader partial-term search.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read qualifying invoice files from Dec 2025 onward
Compute total and report one number
next_step.observation: Exact search returned four invoice line-item matches, including December 2025 and February 2026 records.

next_step.current_state: Need auditable cross-validation by reading candidate invoice files; first load nested rulebook in invoices folder.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read all four matched invoice files
Sum matching line-item totals dated from 2025-12 onward and report
next_step.observation: Broader partial-term search returned the same four matching invoice files.

next_step.current_state: Invoices lane rulebook loaded; now reading matched invoices to verify dates and amounts directly.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Compute Dec 2025 onward total and report
next_step.observation: 50_finance/invoices/AGENTS.MD confirms exact handling of invoice identity and date-sensitive details.

next_step.current_state: Read first matched invoice; it is before Dec 2025 and should be excluded, but continue reading remaining matches for full validation.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Sum line_eur for target item from Dec 2025 onward and report
next_step.observation: INV-0001 (issued 2025-10-28) contains the target line item with line_eur 370, but its date is before December 2025.

next_step.current_state: Second invoice read and excluded by date (Nov 2025). Continue with Dec 2025+ invoices.
next_step.observation: INV-0002 (issued 2025-11-25) includes target line_eur 185 but is still before December 2025.

next_step.current_state: Read first in-range invoice (Dec 2025). Need final matched invoice in Feb 2026 to complete sum.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Calculate in-range total for target line item
next_step.observation: INV-0003 issued 2025-12-23 includes 'operator workflow discovery sprint' with line_eur 185.

next_step.current_state: Computed exact total for target service from invoices issued on/after 2025-12-01.
next_step.observation: Matching in-range line items are 185 EUR (2025-12-23 INV-0003) and 650 EUR (2026-02-08 INV-0004), totaling 835 EUR.

function.rulebook_notes: Completed required bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system per root rule, read nested AGENTS.MD files before using finance/invoice records, and used exact auditable invoice line items.
function.outcome_justification: Search for 'operator workflow discovery sprint' returned four invoice matches; after reading all four, only invoices from December 2025 onward qualify: INV-0003 line_eur 185 and INV-0004 line_eur 650. Sum is 835.
